title: pseudolysimachion rotundum subsp. coreanum
intro: Pseudolysimachion rotundum subsp. coreanum, also known as Corean boxwood or Korean boxwood, is a perennial plant species belonging to the primrose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Pseudolysimachion rotundum subsp. coreanum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
